bead.title: Stage 1.3: write SD-022 migration design doc
bead.description: Create new file docs/helix/02-design/solution-designs/SD-022-gql-svelte-migration.md. Captures the architectural rationale for the Svelte+GraphQL migration. Names the full stack (gqlgen, graphql-ws, SvelteKit, Svelte 5, adapter-static, Bun, Houdini, bits-ui, lucide-svelte, Tailwind, Playwright, Vitest, svelte-check). Lists all four stages and their gate criteria. Cross-references ADR-002, FEAT-008, FEAT-021. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 1 bead #3.
bead.acceptance: (1) SD-022-gql-svelte-migration.md exists under docs/helix/02-design/solution-designs/. (2) Reviewer reads the doc end-to-end and can explain the 4-stage sequence + gate criteria without asking questions. (3) Zero references to React, Vite, TanStack, MiniSearch in the new doc.
